gold: Thế làm thế nào để tôi có được bản sao sao kê hoặc là hóa đơn mới nhất của thẻ tín dụng vậy?

sigWerErrors.reason: 'bản' (copy/document) and 'cái' (thing/object) are different words; this changes the meaning of the request and makes it unclear what is being asked for.
'đơn' (bill/document) and 'đất' (land/soil) are unrelated; this substitution makes the sentence incoherent.
'nhất' (most/newest) and 'ít' (few/little) have different meanings, but the overall intent of requesting a document is still somewhat understandable.
'thẻ' (card) and 'thế' (so/that) are different; this changes the meaning and makes the sentence confusing.
